originalTitle: Acer’s Swift Go 16 is a lot of laptop for $900
summary: As high memory and storage prices have driven up the cost of everything from consoles to computers, finding a competent laptop for under $1,000 has become a challenge. Thankfully, the Acer Swift Go 16 AI is on sale for $899.99 at Best Buy, a steep discount from its usual list price of $1,549.99. The well-equipped […]
content: As high memory and storage prices have driven up the cost of everything from consoles to computers, finding a competent laptop for under $1,000 has become a challenge. Thankfully, the Acer Swift Go 16 AI is on sale for $899.99 at Best Buy, a steep discount from its usual list price of $1,549.99. The well-equipped laptop has an Intel Core Ultra 7 355 processor, 32GB of LPDDR5X memory, and a 1TB SSD. It has a great 16-inch OLED (1,920 x 1,200) touchscreen, too. Its tall 16:10 aspect ratio lets you see more, and it has a 180-degree hinge that lets you find your preferred viewing angle. [Product: Acer Swift Go 16 AI | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Facer-swift-go-16-ai-copilot-pc-16-2k-oled-touchscreen-laptop-intel-core-ultra-7-355-32gb-memory-1tb-storage-vapor-silver%2FJJ8V8HLFZL%2Fsku%2F6671805] The generously-sized multi-touch touchpad has a Corning Gorilla Glass top layer, and its backlit keyboard even squeezed in a numpad. Sure, its integrated Intel graphics aren’t great for serious gaming, but it should be more than powerful enough for Balatro, and the system can run for over 20 hours on a single charge, depending on brightness settings. It has quite a few ports, particularly when compared to other slim laptops, including two USB-A 3.2 ports, two USB-C with Thunderbolt 4 support, HDMI 2.1, a microSD card slot, and a 3.5mm headphone jack. Correction, June 30th: An earlier version of this article mistakenly used a photograph of the Acer Swift 16 AI instead of the Acer Swift Go 16 AI.
chineseTitle: 宏碁 Swift Go 16 是一款售价 900 美元的笔记本电脑
chineseSummary: 由于高昂的内存和存储价格推高了从游戏机到电脑等各种产品的成本，因此寻找一款价格低于 1,000 美元的优质笔记本电脑已成为一项挑战。值得庆幸的是，Acer Swift Go 16 AI 在百思买的售价为 899.99 美元，比通常的 1,549.99 美元标价大幅折扣。设备齐全的[…]
chineseContent: 由于高昂的内存和存储价格推高了从游戏机到电脑等各种产品的成本，因此寻找一款价格低于 1,000 美元的优质笔记本电脑已成为一项挑战。值得庆幸的是，Acer Swift Go 16 AI 在百思买的售价为 899.99 美元，比通常的 1,549.99 美元标价大幅折扣。这款配备精良的笔记本电脑配备了 Intel Core Ultra 7 355 处理器、32GB LPDDR5X 内存和 1TB SSD。它还具有出色的 16 英寸 OLED (1,920 x 1,200) 触摸屏。其 16:10 的高宽高比让您看得更清楚，并且它具有 180 度铰链，可让您找到自己喜欢的视角。 [产品：Acer Swift Go 16 AI | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Facer-swift-go-16-ai-copilot-p c-16-2k-oled-触摸屏-笔记本电脑-intel-core-ultra-7-355-32gb-内存-1tb-存储-vapor-silver%2FJJ8V8HLFZL%2Fsku%2F6671805]宽大的多点触控触摸板具有康宁大猩猩玻璃顶层，其背光键盘甚至挤在数字键盘中。当然，它的集成英特尔显卡不适合严肃的游戏，但它对于 Balatro 来说应该足够强大，并且系统一次充电可以运行 20 多个小时，具体取决于亮度设置。它有相当多的端口，特别是与其他轻薄笔记本电脑相比，包括两个 USB-A 3.2 端口、两个支持 Thunderbolt 4 的 USB-C、HDMI 2.1、一个 microSD 卡插槽和一个 3.5 毫米耳机插孔。更正，6 月 30 日：本文的早期版本错误地使用了 Acer Swift 16 AI 的照片，而不是 Acer Swift Go 16 AI。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
